questionHtml: The daily amount of antibiotic Ted receives will first be less than 0.06 mg on the k  th day. Find the value of k .
markschemeHtml:
20 × ( 0.5 ) k − 1 < 0.06       (M1)(M1)

Note: Award (M1) for correct substitution into the geometric sequence formula; (M1) for comparing their expression to 0.06. Accept an equation instead of inequality.

( k =) 10  (10th day)       (A1)(ft)(G3)

Note: Follow through from part (d)(i), if 0 < r < 1. Follow through answers must be rounded up for final mark.

[3 marks]

meta.title: The daily amount of antibiotic Ted receives will first be less than 0.06 mg on the k th day. Find the value of k .
